case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. ROSIE CUADRA et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-14-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CUADRA, ROSIE DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-14-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-13-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-27-2003

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUADRA, ROSIE $5,988.00 PRINCIPAL, $312.95 INTEREST, $144.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,444.95, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
